flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Little Big Horn College are 15% below 6-year earnings ($25.0k → $21.2k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Little Big Horn College rose 91% between 2006 and 2009 (4.8% → 9.2%).
